<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[commons:Category:Keta-hongu]][[ja:気多本宮]]
<!--generated by generate_shikinaisha_pages_v25_with_redirects.py-->
{{Expand Japanese|気多本宮}}

{{Infobox religious building
| name = Keta-hongū
| native_name = 気多本宮
| image = Keta-hongu (Nanao), Gate.jpg
| mapframe = yes
| mapframe-zoom = 15
| mapframe-wikidata = yes
| mapframe-point = none
| map_type = Japan
| map_caption = Keta-hongū
| coordinates = {{coord|37.03777777777778|136.9638888888889}}
| map_relief = 1
| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]
| deity = {{ill|Ōkuninushi|lt=Ōkuninushi|ca|Ōkuninushi|en|Ōkuninushi|es|Ōkuninushi|fa|اوکونینوشی|fr|Ōkuninushi|hu|Ókuninusi|id|Ookuninushi|it|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主|ko|오오쿠니누시|mni|ꯑꯣꯀꯨꯅꯤꯅꯨꯁꯤ|pl|Ōkuninushi|pt|Ookuninushi|ru|Окунинуси|simple|Ōkuninushi|sr|Okuninuši|sv|Ōkuninushi|tr|Ōkuninushi|uk|Окунінуші|vi|Ōkuninushi|zh|大國主|qid=Q276944|1=Ōkuninushi}}
}}

{{nihongo|'''Keta-hongū'''|気多本宮}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Noto Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

* {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická svatyně|da|Shinto-tempel|de|Shintō-Schrein|el|Σιντοϊστικό Ιερό|en|Shinto shrine|eo|Ŝintoa sanktejo|es|Jinja|eu|Jinja|fa|معبد شینتویی|fi|Šintolainen pyhäkkö|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|शिंतो मंदिर|hr|Šintoistički hram|hu|Sintó szentély|id|Jinja|it|Jinja|ja|神社|ka|ძინძია|ko|신사 (신토)|lb|Shintō-Schräin|mr|शिंतो मंदिर|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|ଜିଞ୍ଜା|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xintoísta|ru|Дзиндзя|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Šintoistično svetišče|sr|Шинтоистички храм|sv|Jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าชินโต|tr|Şinto tapınağı|uk|Святилище (синто)|vi|Thần xã|wuu|神社|zh_yue|神社|zh|神社|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}}
* {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}}
* {{ill|Q134917287|ltq=Q134917287|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}}
* {{ill|Q135160342|ltq=Q135160342|qid=Q135160342|1=Kokuhei-sha}}<ref>Kokugakuin University Shrine database</ref>
* {{ill|Q135038714|ltq=Q135038714|qid=Q135038714|1=Disputed Shikinaisha or Shikigeisha}}<ref>Kokugakuin University Shrine database</ref>
* {{ill|Q135419779|ltq=Q135419779|qid=Q135419779|1=Shikinai Supershrine}}

== part of (P361) ==

* {{ill|List of Shikinaisha in Noto Province|lt=List of Shikinaisha in Noto Province|ja|能登国の式内社一覧|qid=Q11612019|1=List of Shikinaisha in Noto Province}}
** Series ordinal: 23
** P155: {{ill|Q135040320|ltq=Q135040320|qid=Q135040320|1=Kutehikono Shrine}}
** P156: {{ill|Q135040321|ltq=Q135040321|qid=Q135040321|1=Shirahikono Shrine}}

== located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) ==

* {{ill|Nanao, Ishikawa|lt=Nanao|af|Nanao|ar|ناناو (إيشيكاوا)|azb|نانائو، ایشیکاوا|ceb|Nanao (lungsod)|ce|Нанао|de|Nanao|en|Nanao, Ishikawa|envoyage|Nanao (Japan)|es|Nanao (Ishikawa)|et|Nanao|eu|Nanao (Ishikawa)|fa|نانائو، ایشیکاوا|fi|Nanao|fr|Nanao|frvoyage|Nanao (Japon)|gl|Nanao|it|Nanao|ja|七尾市|ko|나나오시|mg|Nanao|ms|Nanao, Ishikawa|mzn|نانائو، ایشیکاوا|nl|Nanao (Ishikawa)|pl|Nanao|pt|Nanao|ro|Nanao|ru|Нанао|sv|Nanao|tg|Нанао|th|นานาโอะ (อิชิกาวะ)|tl|Nanao, Ishikawa|tr|Nanao|tt|Нанао|uk|Нанао|vi|Nanao, Ishikawa|war|Nanao, Ishikawa|zh_classical|七尾市|zh_min_nan|Nanao-chhī|zh_yue|七尾|zh|七尾市|qid=Q695892|1=Nanao, Ishikawa}}
* {{ill|Q1047671|ltq=Q1047671|qid=Q1047671|1=Noto Province}}

== coordinate location (P625) ==

* {{coord|37.03777777777778|136.9638888888889}}

== image (P18) ==

* Keta-hongu (Nanao), Gate.jpg

== dedicated to (P825) ==

* {{ill|Q276944|ltq=Q276944|qid=Q276944|1=Ōkuninushi}}

== Kokugakuin University Digital Museum entry ID (P13677) ==

* 182365
** P3831: {{ill|Kokugakuin University Shrine database|lt=Kokugakuin University Shrine database|qid=Q135159299|1=Kokugakuin University Shrine database}}

== modern shrine ranking (P13723) ==

* {{ill|Q90139226|ltq=Q90139226|qid=Q90139226|1=Ken-sha}}
** End time: {'time': '+1946-02-02T00:00:00Z', 'timezone': 0, 'before': 0, 'after': 0, 'precision': 11, 'calendarmodel': 'http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q1985727'}
** P1534: {{ill|Q3029647|ltq=Q3029647|qid=Q3029647|1=Shinto Directive}}

== country (P17) ==

* {{ill|Japan|lt=Japan|ab|Иапониа|ace|Jeupang|ady|Японие|af|Japan|als|Japan|alt|Јопон|ami|Ripon|am|ጃፓን|ang|Iapan|anp|जापान|an|Chapón|arc|ܝܦܢ|ar|اليابان|arnews|تصنيف:اليابان|arquote|اليابان|ary|الجاپون|arz|اليابان|ast|Xapón|as|জাপান|atj|Japan|avk|Nipona|av|Япония|awa|जापान|ay|Nihun|azb|ژاپون|az|Yaponiya|azquote|Yaponiya|ban|Jepang|bar|Japan|bat_smg|Japuonėjė|ba|Япония|bbc|Japang|bcl|Hapon|bdr|Gipun|be_x_old|Японія|be|Японія|bew|Jepang|bg|Япония|bgnews|Категория:Япония|bh|जापान|bi|Japan|bjn|Japang|blk|ဂျပန်ခမ်းထီ|bm|Japan|bn|জাপান|bnquote|জাপান|bnvoyage|জাপান|bo|ཉི་ཧོང་།|bpy|জাপান|br|Japan|bs|Japan|bsnews|Kategorija:Japan|btm|Jepang|bug|ᨍᨛᨄ|bxr|Япон Улас|ca|Japó|canews|Categoria:Japó|caquote|Japó|cbk_zam|Japón|cdo|Nĭk-buōng|ceb|Hapon|ce|Ипнойчоь|chr|ᏣᏩᏂᏏ|ch|Chapan|chy|Japan|ckb|ژاپۆن|co|Giappone|crh|Japon|csb|Japòńskô|cs|Japonsko|csnews|Kategorie:Japonsko|csquote|Japonsko|csvoyage|Japonsko|cu|Ꙗпѡнїꙗ|cv|Япони|cy|Japan|dag|Japan|da|Japan|de|Japan|denews|Kategorie:Japan|dequote|Japan|devoyage|Japan|din|Japan|diq|Japonya|dsb|Japańska|dtp|Jepun|dty|जापान|dv|ޖަޕާނު|dz|ཇ་པཱན|ee|Japan|el|Ιαπωνία|elnews|Κατηγορία:Ιαπωνία|elquote|Ιαπωνία|elvoyage|Ιαπωνία|eml|Giapòṅ|en|Japan|ennews|Category:Japan|enquote|Japan|envoyage|Japan|eo|Japanio|eonews|Kategorio:Japanujo|eoquote|Japanio|eovoyage|Japanio|es|Japón|esnews|Categoría:Japón|esquote|Japón|esvoyage|Japón|et|Jaapan|etquote|Jaapan|eu|Japonia|ext|Japón|fa|ژاپن|fanews|رده:ژاپن|faquote|ژاپن|favoyage|ژاپن|ff|Japan|fiu_vro|Jaapan|fi|Japani|finews|Luokka:Japani|fivoyage|Japani|fj|Japani|fo|Japan|frp|Japon|frr|Jaapan|fr|Japon|frnews|Catégorie:Japon|frquote|Japon|frvoyage|Japon|fur|Gjapon|fy|Japan|gag|Yaponiya|gan|日本|ga|An tSeapáin|gcr|Japon|gd|An Iapan|glk|ژاپؤن|gl|Xapón|gn|Hapõ|gom|जपान|gor|Japangi|gorquote|Jepang|got|𐌾𐌰𐍀𐌰𐌽|gu|જાપાન|guw|Japan|gv|Yn Çhapaan|hak|Ngi̍t-pún|ha|Japan|haw|Iāpana|he|יפן|henews|תגית:יפן|hequote|יפן|hevoyage|יפן|hif|Japan|hi|जापान|hiquote|जापान|hivoyage|जापान|hr|Japan|hsb|Japanska|ht|Japon|hu|Japán|hunews|Kategória:Japán|hy|Ճապոնիա|hyw|Ճափոն|ia|Japon|iba|Jipun|id|Jepang|idquote|Jepang|idvoyage|Jepang|ie|Japan|igl|Japan|ig|Japan|ik|Nippan|ilo|Hapon|inh|Японехье|io|Japonia|is|Japan|it|Giappone|itnews|Categoria:Giappone|itquote|Giappone|itvoyage|Giappone|iu|ᔭᐹᓐ|jam|Japan|ja|日本|janews|カテゴリ:日本|jaquote|日本|javoyage|日本|jbo|pongu'e|jv|Jepang|kaa|Yaponiya|kab|Yapan|ka|იაპონია|kbd|Япон|kbp|Sapɔŋ|kcg|Ja̱pan|kge|Jopang|kg|Japan|ki|Japan|kk|Жапония|km|ជប៉ុន|knc|Japan|kn|ಜಪಾನ್|koi|Ниппон|ko|일본|konews|분류:일본|koquote|일본|krc|Джапония|ksh|Japan|ks|جاپان|ku|Japon|kv|Япония|kw|Nihon|ky|Жапония|lad|Japon|la|Iaponia|lbe|Япония|lb|Japan|lez|Япония|lfn|Nion|lg|Japan|lij|Giappon|li|Japan|lld|Iapan|lmo|Giapon|ln|Zapɔ́|lo|ປະເທດຍີ່ປຸ່ນ|ltg|Japoneja|lt|Japonija|lv|Japāna|mad|Jeppang|mai|जापान|map_bms|Jepang|mdf|Японмастор|mg|Japàna|mhr|Японий|min|Japang|mi|Nipono|mk|Јапонија|ml|ജപ്പാൻ|mni|ꯖꯄꯥꯟ|mn|Япон|mrj|Япони|mr|जपान|ms|Jepun|msquote|Jepun|mt|Ġappun|mwl|Japon|myv|Япония Мастор|my|ဂျပန်နိုင်ငံ|mzn|جاپون|nap|Giappone|nds_nl|Japan|nds|Japan|ne|जापान|new|जापान|nia|Jepang|nl|Japan|nlnews|Categorie:Japan|nlvoyage|Japan|nn|Japan|nov|Japan|no|Japan|nqo|ߗ߭ߊߔߐ߲߫|nrm|Japon|nr|Japane|nso|Japane|nv|Binááʼádaałtsʼózí Dineʼé Bikéyah|ny|Japan|oc|Japon|olo|Japounii|om|Jaappaan|or|ଜାପାନ|os|Япон|pag|Hapon|pam|Hapon|pap|Hapon|pa|ਜਪਾਨ|pcd|Japon|pcm|Japan|pdc|Japan|pfl|Japan|pl|Japonia|plnews|Kategoria:Japonia|plquote|Japonia|plvoyage|Japonia|pms|Giapon|pnb|جاپان|pnt|Ιαπωνία|ps|جاپان|pt|Japão|ptnews|Categoria:Japão|ptquote|Japão|ptvoyage|Japão|pwn|Dripun|qu|Hapun|rm|Giapun|rmy|Japan|rn|Yapon|roa_rup|Japonia|roa_tara|Giappone|ro|Japonia|ronews|Categorie:Japonia|rovoyage|Japonia|rue|Японія|ru|Япония|runews|Категория:Япония|ruvoyage|Япония|rw|Ubuyapani|sah|Дьоппуон|sat|ᱡᱟᱯᱟᱱ|sa|जपान्|scn|Giappuni|sco|Japan|sc|Giapone|sd|جاپان|se|Jáhpan|sg|Zapöo|shn|မိူင်းၵျႃႇပၢၼ်ႇ|sh|Japan|simple|Japan|si|ජපානය|skr|جاپان|sk|Japonsko|sl|Japonska|smn|Jaapaan|sm|Iapani|sn|Japani|so|Jabaan|sq|Japonia|sqnews|Kategoria:Japoni|srn|Japan|sr|Јапан|srnews|Категорија:Јапан|srquote|Јапан|ss|IJapani|stq|Japan|st|Japane|su|Jepang|sv|Japan|svnews|Kategori:Japan|svvoyage|Japan|sw|Japani|syl|ꠎꠣꠙꠣꠘ|szl|Japůńijo|szy|Zipun|ta|யப்பான்|tanews|பகுப்பு:ஜப்பான்|tay|Gipun|tcy|ಜಪಾನ್|tdd|ᥛᥫᥒᥰ ᥓᥣᥱ ᥙᥣᥢᥱ|tet|Japaun|te|జపాన్|tg|Ҷопон|th|ประเทศญี่ปุ่น|thnews|หมวดหมู่:ประเทศญี่ปุ่น|tig|ጃፓን|ti|ጃፓን|tk|Ýaponiýa|tl|Hapon|tly|Japonijə|tn|Japan|tok|ma Nijon|to|Siapani|tpi|Siapan|trv|Tanah Tunux|tr|Japonya|trnews|Kategori:Japonya|trquote|Japonya|trvoyage|Japonya|ts|Japani|tt|Япония|tum|Japan|tw|Japan|tyv|Япония|ty|Tāpōnē|udm|Япония|ug|ياپونىيە|uk|Японія|uknews|Категорія:Японія|ukquote|Японія|ukvoyage|Японія|ur|جاپان|uz|Yaponiya|vec|Japon|vep|Japonii|ve|Japan|vi|Nhật Bản|vibooks|Các quốc gia/Nhật Bản|vivoyage|Nhật Bản|vls|Japan|vo|Yapän|war|Hapon|wa|Djapon|wo|Sapoŋ|wuu|日本|xal|Ниxуудин Нутг|xh|IJapani|xmf|იაპონია|yi|יאפאן|yo|Japan|za|Nyiedbonj|zea|Japan|zgh|ⵏⵉⴱⵓⵏ|zh_classical|日本|zh_min_nan|Ji̍t-pún|zh_yue|日本|zh|日本|zhnews|Category:日本|zhquote|日本|zhvoyage|日本|zu|IJaphani|qid=Q17|1=Japan}}

== name in kana (P1814) ==

* けたほんぐう

== Commons category (P373) ==

* Keta-hongu

== has part(s) (P527) ==

* {{ill|Noto Ikutama-hiko Shrine (Keta Hongū)|lt=Noto Ikutama-hiko Shrine (Keta Hongū)|qid=Q135194890|1=Noto Ikutama-hiko Shrine (Keta Hongū)}}
** P1352: {'amount': '+1', 'unit': '1'}
** P3831: {{ill|Q135022904|ltq=Q135022904|qid=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}}
* {{ill|Q135194892|ltq=Q135194892|qid=Q135194892|1=Noto Ikutama-hiko Shrine}}<ref>Kokugakuin University Shrine database</ref>
** P1352: {'amount': '+2', 'unit': '1'}
** P3831: {{ill|Q135022904|ltq=Q135022904|qid=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}}
* {{ill|Q135194893|ltq=Q135194893|qid=Q135194893|1=Notobu Shrine}}
** P1352: {'amount': '+3', 'unit': '1'}
** P3831: {{ill|Shikinai Ronsha|lt=Shikinai Ronsha|ja|論社|qid=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}}

== street address (P6375) ==

* {'text': '石川県七尾市所口町ハ部70の1番地', 'language': 'ja'}








{{commons category|Category:Keta-hongu}}
[[JA:気多本宮]]

{{wikidata link|Q11548072}}

== Japanese content ==
{{Otheruses|石川県七尾市の神社|その他の気多神社|気多神社 (曖昧さ回避)}}
{{神社
|名称   = 気多本宮<br />（能登生国玉比古神社）
|画像   = [[File:Keta-hongu (Nanao), Gate.jpg|250px]]<br />随身門と拝殿
|所在地 = {{ill|lt=石川県|Q131281|qid=Q131281|1=Ishikawa Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=七尾市|Q695892|qid=Q695892|1=Nanao, Ishikawa}}所口町ハ部70の1番地
|位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}}
|祭神   = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=大己貴命|1=UNKNOWN}}、<br/>{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=素盞鳴命|1=UNKNOWN}}、<br/>{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=奇稲田姫命|1=UNKNOWN}}
|社格   = {{ill|lt=能登国|Q1047671|qid=Q1047671|1=Noto Province}}総鎮守、旧{{ill|UNKNOWN|qid=Q90139226|lt=県社|lt=Ken-sha|qq=|1=Ken-sha}}
|創建   = 
|本殿   = 
|別名   = 気多本宮
|例祭   = 平国祭、<br/>鵜祭
|神事   = 
|地図 = {{Location map|Japan Ishikawa|label=気多本宮|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}}
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}}
}}
'''気多本宮'''（けたほんぐう）は、{{ill|lt=石川県|Q131281|qid=Q131281|1=Ishikawa Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=七尾市|Q695892|qid=Q695892|1=Nanao, Ishikawa}}に位置する{{ill|lt=神社|Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}}である。正式には'''能登生国玉比古神社'''（のといくくにたまひこじんじゃ）と称する。

=== 概要 ===
{{ill|lt=能登国|Q1047671|qid=Q1047671|1=Noto Province}}{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=総鎮守|1=UNKNOWN}}で、上代には能登の大神と仰がれていた。{{ill|lt=大国主|Q276944|qid=Q276944|lt=大己貴命|1=Ōkuninushi}}を祭神とする。

=== 歴史 ===
上古孝元天皇の治世に創祀されたと伝える。崇神天皇の御代に羽咋の竹津浦に祭神を分霊し気多神社が創祀、それから気多本宮と称するようになった。

=== 祭事 ===
* {{ill|lt=3月21日|Q2433|qid=Q2433|1=March 21}} - 平国祭（くにむけのまつり）、通称「おいで祭」
* {{ill|lt=12月13日|Q2379|qid=Q2379|1=December 13}} - 鵜祭（新嘗祭）

=== 周辺 ===
* 本宮閣
* 本宮保育園

=== 交通アクセス ===
; 鉄道
: {{ill|lt=西日本旅客鉄道|Q502125|qid=Q502125|lt=JR西日本|1=West Japan Railway Company}}{{ill|lt=七尾線|Q5357471|qid=Q5357471|1=Nanao Line}}： {{ill|lt=七尾駅|Q6962435|qid=Q6962435|1=Nanao Station}}下車、車で5分。

=== 脚注 ===
{{Reflist}}

=== 関連項目 ===
* {{ill|lt=神社一覧|Q2517815|qid=Q2517815|1=List of Shinto shrines in Japan}}
* {{ill|lt=気多大社|Q11129340|qid=Q11129340|1=Keta Taisha}}

=== 外部リンク ===
* [https://www.ishikawa-jinjacho.or.jp/shrine/j1369/ 石川県神社庁（気多本宮）] 
{{神道 横}}

{{shinto-stub}}
{{デフォルトソート:けたほんくう}}

== Categories ==
[[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Keta-hongū]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Keta-hongū]][[Category:Shinto shrine]]
[[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]]
[[Category:Shikinai Supershrine]]
[[Category:Shikinaisha in Noto Province]]
[[Category:Shinto shrines in Ishikawa Prefecture]]
[[Category:Municipal History of Nanao]]
[[Category:Shikinaisha in Noto Province]]
[[Category:石川県の旧県社]]
[[Category:Buildings and structures in Nanao, Ishikawa]]
[[Category:Need translation]]
[[Category:Pages with 50+ untranslated japanese characters]]
[[Category:Pages with 100+ untranslated japanese characters]]
[[Category:Pages with 150+ untranslated japanese characters]]
[[Category:Pages with 200+ untranslated japanese characters]]
